creator: sf@FreeBSD.org
text:
At Sun, 17 Jun 2001 12:52:10 -0500,
Erick Kinnee wrote:
> That's nice to know, but how much easier would "more Changelog" be from
> inside the port dir?

Adding same log twice to CVS repository is simply silly. Subscribe
cvs-all mailing list and you'll get all logs for any change.

Another answer: cvsup cvs-all collection to get CVSROOT/commitlogs.

There are enough information provided. Feel free to write a script to
make them easy-to-read for you. 

-- 
FUJISHIMA Satsuki
